headline: AMGEN TO PRESENT NEW DATA ACROSS RARE AUTOIMMUNE AND INFLAMMATORY DISEASES AT EULAR 2026
summary: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) today announced the presentation of new data across rare autoimmune and inflammatory diseases at the European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology (EULAR) 2026 Congress, taking place from June 3-6 in London.
